data.title: DDOS Protection
data.description: Prevents Distributed Denial of Service attacks using advanced traffic analysis.
data.technical_spec: Cloud Armor security policies applied through the Google Cloud Platform.

data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures all user data is encrypted during storage and transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 used for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Additional authentication layer to enhance user account security.
data.technical_spec: SMS-based and app-based (Google Authenticator) two-factor options.

data.title: Automated Bot Detection
data.description: Prevents abusive bot activities using machine learning algorithms.
data.technical_spec: Real-time analysis with reCAPTCHA and proprietary ML models.

data.title: Security Patching Protocol
data.description: Regular updates to maintain security posture against vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management with a 24-hour response team.
